◎译　　名　市场街的疯医生
◎片　　名　Mad Doctor of Market Street
◎年　　代　1942
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　别　恐怖
◎语　　言　英语
◎上映日期　1942-02-27(美国)
◎IMDb评分  5.2/10 from 593 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0035007/
◎豆瓣评分　0/10 from 0 users
◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/24379758/
◎导　　演　约瑟夫·刘易斯 Joseph H. Lewis

◎简　　介  

　　A mad scientist is forced to leave San Francisco when his experiments become known. He lands on a tropical island, takes control and terrorizes the local populace. The survivor of a shipwreck washes ashore on the island, sees what is happening and determines to free the natives from his rule.

director.name: 约瑟夫·刘易斯 Joseph H. Lewis

introduction: A mad scientist is forced to leave San Francisco when his experiments become known. He lands on a tropical island, takes control and terrorizes the local populace. The survivor of a shipwreck washes ashore on the island, sees what is happening and determines to free the natives from his rule.
